# Signal Plane — Control Plane

> Automated competitive intelligence infrastructure for B2B SaaS teams.

## About

- Company: Signal Plane
- Product: Control Plane
- Website: https://signalplane.dev
- Category: Competitive Intelligence / B2B SaaS

## What Control Plane Does

Control Plane monitors competitor signals weekly using 10+ automated monitors. It tracks messaging changes, pricing edits, hiring patterns, partnership announcements, and more. Every Monday, a structured decision packet ships to Slack, Notion, or email — evidence-linked, severity-ranked, and mapped to owners and actions.

## Key Capabilities

- Automated competitor website monitoring (messaging, pricing, product pages)
- Weekly decision packets with executive summaries and key shifts
- 10+ intelligence monitors: competitive messaging, market narrative, targeting shifts, pricing, hiring, partnerships, social proof, early warning, post-launch intel, buyer resistance
- Severity scoring (0-100) with per-category caps
- 90-day hypothesis tracking with prediction accuracy
- Auto-generated battlecards, objection libraries, and buyer language swipe files
- Delivery to Slack, Notion, or email
- Evidence-grade signals — every claim links to its source

## Who It's For

- Marketing Leaders — weekly evidence-linked intelligence for positioning decisions
- Product Marketing — automated monitoring replaces manual competitor tracking
- Revenue & Sales — fresh weekly battlecards with talk tracks and competitive positioning

## How It Works

1. Collect: 10+ automated monitors scan public competitor signals weekly
2. Score & Filter: Every signal scored 0-100. Per-category caps prevent noise. Top 25 make the cut.
3. Deliver: Structured decision packet ships to Slack, Notion, or email every Monday

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://signalplane.dev
- Live Demo: https://signalplane.dev/demo/developer-tools
- Sign Up: https://signalplane.dev/login

## Differentiators

- Decision infrastructure, not content aggregation (unlike Klue or Crayon)
- Evidence-grade: every claim links to a source, predictions tracked against outcomes
- Automated end-to-end: no manual curation, no setup calls
- Intelligence that compounds: predictions scored weekly, objections and buyer phrases persist

## Industries Covered

Developer Tools, Product Analytics, Cybersecurity, Sales Engagement, Customer Success, Marketing Automation, Data Infrastructure, Fintech Infrastructure, HR Tech, Collaboration, Cloud Infrastructure, AI/ML Platforms, DevOps & Observability, E-commerce Platforms, No-Code/Low-Code
